_comment: Zillow Scraper configuration. Edit zip_codes to match your target areas.
_comment_search_mode: use_city_search=true fetches all of San Diego paginated then filters by zip locally. false queries each zip individually (faster, fewer pages).
_comment_home_types: Zillow values: SINGLE_FAMILY, TOWNHOUSE, CONDO, APARTMENT, MANUFACTURED, LOT, MULTI_FAMILY. null = no filter.
